context.audience: Indie developers building Chrome extensions as side projects or products, startup teams adding browser-based AI features, developers creating productivity tools that integrate with web apps
pain_points: Navigating Chrome extension Manifest V3 migration and service worker limitations
Managing permissions and user data securely in browser extensions
Chrome Web Store review process and policy compliance
Integrating AI APIs from extension context with proper key management
Building cross-browser extensions that work on Chrome, Firefox, and Safari
monetization: Freemium extension model with pro upgrades
